<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/fa.php', [ 'meridiem' => ['ق', 'ب'], 'weekend' => [4, 5], 'formats' => [ 'L' => 'OY/OM/OD', 'LL' => 'OD MMM OY', 'LLL' => 'OD MMMM OY،‏ H:mm', 'LLLL' => 'dddd OD MMMM OY،‏ H:mm', ], ]);
